nasb.text: Speak, “Thus says the Lord, ‘The corpses of men will fall like dung on the open field, And like the sheaf after the reaper, But no one will gather them.’ ”

esv.text: Speak: “Thus declares the Lord, ‘The dead bodies of men shall fall like dung upon the open field, like sheaves after the reaper, and none shall gather them.’”

cnv.text: 你要這樣說： “人的屍體橫臥著， 像田野上的糞肥， 又像遺留在收割者後面的麥穗， 無人拾取。”

ccb.text: 耶和华说：“人们必尸横遍野， 像散布在田野上的粪便， 又像收割者身后没有收集的禾捆。”
